description_long: This is a large, military-style cargo truck with a robust olive green cab and a long, covered rear compartment. The cab features two large, rectangular windows, a circular hatch on the roof, and prominent side mirrors. The rear cargo area is covered with a beige canvas tarp, supported by a rigid frame, and extends the full length of the truck's chassis. The vehicle has three axles with six large, rugged tires designed for heavy loads and off-road capability. The side panels of the cargo area are reinforced with metal plating and storage compartments. The overall design suggests durability and utility, suitable for transporting goods or personnel in urban or rugged environments.
description: A large olive green military-style cargo truck with a beige canvas-covered rear compartment and six rugged tires. The cab is boxy with large windows and a circular roof hatch.
description_view_0: Front view shows the boxy cab, two large windows, circular roof hatch, and the front grille.
description_view_1: Left side view highlights the full length of the truck, the covered cargo area, three axles, and side storage compartments.
description_view_2: Rear view displays the end of the covered cargo area and the reinforced rear panel.
description_view_3: Right side view mirrors the left, showing the cab, covered cargo bed, and three axles.
